sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63587" key="li/rinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λίρινος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λιριόεις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λίριον</orth>, less correct forms of <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">λειρ</itype>-.</entryFree>
